summary: Multi-page professional web app based on user's sketches and provided screenshots, updated to use a lighter navy/green gradient across the entire app with animated/glowing buttons and stronger logo emphasis—especially on the front/landing and loading pages—while keeping existing icons/images unless changes are needed. Includes authentication and key modules like business analytics plus professional photo/video generation (AI generation + templates/animations) backed by a database.
architectural_notes: App scope may exceed platform size limits; consider modularizing/simplifying features if build fails due to size.

Global theme direction changed: replace darker navy/green/black gradient with a lighter navy/green gradient across the entire app; keep existing icons/images unless changes are needed; emphasize logo on landing/front and loading pages.

User requests a single consistent medium blue-green gradient background across all pages (AppShell, login, loading, and all routes) with very dark text throughout; icons should also switch to the same dark color (avoid white-on-light causing blank/washed-out UI).
known_issues: Previous build attempt failed due to app being too large/complex for the platform to process.
User reports the current draft appears blank/they "can't see anything"; investigate visibility/rendering/contrast issues so the UI reliably displays.

existing_features.title: Create the app shell (responsive) with a left sidebar navigation inspired by the uploaded BrandBoost screenshots, including routes/pages for: Chat, Photo/Video Maker, Business Analytics, Gallery, and Shop Maker (placeholder).

Apply a consistent professional visual theme across all pages using a navy/green/black gradient background direction with modern typography and subtle glow accents (no blue-purple heavy palette), matching the overall style of the uploaded references.
Implement a lightweight butterfly-flying background animation that appears on every page without blocking UI interactions and with an option to reduce motion (respect prefers-reduced-motion).
Implement authentication using Internet Identity, and provide a dedicated login screen styled similarly to the user’s sketch (simple centered card), plus a logged-in state indicator in the app shell.

Build the Chat page UI based on the BrandBoost-style layout: message list area, message input, and basic chat controls (New Chat, Clear). Implement simple non-AI responses (rule-based or canned) to keep the build lightweight.

Build the Photo/Video Maker landing page with a grid of feature cards inspired by the uploaded BrandBoost maker screenshots. Include at minimum: Photo for Post and Video for Reels/Shorts, with “Get Started” leading to their respective flows.

Implement the Photo for Post flow based on the references: a form page to enter business details (company name, category, product/service, offer, address/contact, additional details, optional image upload), then a theme selection step, then a result page that renders a professional-looking poster using templates (client-side rendering).

Implement the Video for Reels/Shorts flow based on the user sketch: details form (business name, service/product, offers, plus optional media), a transitions/style selection step (simple choices), and a result preview that plays a short template animation (client-side) and allows export (at least as a downloadable MP4/GIF if feasible, otherwise provide a downloadable image sequence/placeholder export).

Build the Business Analytics module inspired by the uploaded BrandBoost analytics screen: a financial input form (initial investment, total revenue, total costs + cost breakdown fields) and an analytics report view with computed metrics (profit, margin) plus simple charts (bar/pie) rendered client-side.
Create a Gallery page inspired by the uploaded BrandBoost gallery screenshot with filter tabs (All, Photos, Videos, Analytics) and cards listing generated outputs with actions to view and download.
Add a Shop Maker placeholder page based on the sketch card (‘Shop maker’) that explains it is coming soon and includes a simple contact/info card layout (no e-commerce or payments).

Replace the current dark blue/purple-heavy global backgrounds with a lighter, readable navy/green gradient across the entire app (AppShell, Login page, and AuthGate loading screen), ensuring text and surfaces maintain strong contrast and are clearly visible.

Update the app’s color tokens and gradients to de-emphasize purple (including the current primary/accent hues) in favor of a light navy + green palette, and apply these tokens consistently to headings, cards, borders, and UI accents.

Implement animated/glowing button styling across the app for primary and key call-to-action buttons, while respecting prefers-reduced-motion (reduce/disable glow animations when the user requests reduced motion).
Increase logo emphasis on the app’s “front page” (Login screen) and on the AuthGate loading screen by adding a clearer, larger logo/wordmark treatment and placing it prominently in the layout.

Keep existing icons and any current imagery unless a change is necessary for readability/consistency, and ensure the UI remains icon-forward rather than adding new full-size decorative images from the BrandBoost references without explicit placement instructions.

Investigate and fix the reported “blank/Can’t see anything” experience by ensuring the authenticated and unauthenticated routes always render visible content (including during initialization), and that no page relies on near-black overlays that obscure content on the updated light gradient background.

Update the global app background so AppShell, LoginPage, AuthGate loading/redirect screens, and all routes consistently use the same medium blue-green gradient (no near-white washout and no purple-heavy gradients).

Make all user-visible text across the app use very dark colors by default (avoid white text), including headings, descriptions, placeholders, tab labels, nav labels, and empty states, while keeping sufficient contrast over the medium blue-green gradient.

Ensure all icons use the same dark color style as the text (no white icons), including sidebar navigation icons, header/menu icons, loading spinner/iconography, chat avatars/icons, and gallery card icons.

Remove remaining hard-coded blue/purple gradient styling and overly-dark/black surfaces that conflict with the new unified medium blue-green theme, ensuring cards/panels remain readable without making the app look blank.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create multi-page web app UI from user's sketches/screenshots with a professional gradient theme and glowing button animations
Add butterfly flying background animation on every page
Implement authentication pages (login/signup) as part of the combined app
Build Business Analytics module/page matching the style/layout from the provided reference images
Add professional Photo Generator supporting both AI image generation (via external REST API) and template-based animations
Add professional Video Generator supporting both AI video generation (via external REST API) and template-based animations
Add database-backed persistence for app data/features

Implement backend persistence (single Motoko actor) for per-user data needed by the simplified app: chat conversations (messages), gallery items (metadata), and saved analytics reports (inputs + computed outputs).
Update global UI styling to a lighter navy/green gradient across all pages with animated/glowing buttons, and increase logo emphasis on the landing/front page and loading page
